message:
Inline captureToJSONStr, use targeted views, remove dead undefined guard

- Inline captureToJSONStr closure: happy path reuses original string
  input directly, complete_early always decodes (parseLen < len)
- Use targeted Uint8Array views in complete_early path instead of
  wrapping entire WASM memory
- Remove dead `val === undefined ? null : val` in array cache —
  resolveValue never returns undefined (JSON has no undefined type)
